Built by Iowa Farmers, for Iowa Farmers

We didn't develop these products in a lab far removed from the realities of modern agriculture. Natural Heartland Solutions was born out of the same fields, barns, and ponds that our customers work every single day.

Our organic puck formulas are OMRI listed and engineered specifically for the challenges facing Midwest livestock producers — from hog pit management to farm pond restoration and soil health optimization.

Talk to Our Team

Our Solutions

Hog Manure and More: The Power of the Pit Puck

Traditional manure management is often an uphill battle against crusting, harsh odors, and critical nutrient loss. Our advanced biological approach shifts the focus from simple waste storage to active nutrient optimization turning your barn's waste into a high value fertilizer asset.

Specifically engineered for commercial hog barns and liquid agricultural setups, dropping these all natural, OMRI listed biological pucks directly into your facility's waste system triggers a focused microbial digestion cascade that delivers measurable results:

  • Nutrient Stabilization: The biology locks vital nutrients into a stable, plant-available liquid state, preventing valuable fertilizer elements from escaping into the atmosphere as gas.
  • Ammonia & Odor Reduction: By stabilizing nitrogen, you drastically eliminate the harsh, ambient ammonia smells that lead to sick pigs and poor working conditions for your crew.
  • Facility Longevity: Lowering corrosive ammonia gas levels protects your investment, preventing long-term structural and equipment deterioration inside the barn.
  • Waste Liquefaction: These specialized microbes aggressively accelerate decomposition to actively reduce heavy bottom sludge, eliminate thick crusting blockages, and prevent foaming methane hazards.

Ponds and Lakes: Organic Pond Pucks

Traditional aquatic management often relies on harsh "chemical shock" treatments that provide only temporary visual fixes while leaving underlying issues untouched. Our innovative approach focuses on Whole Ecosystem Restoration addressing the root causes of water degradation to create self regulating, clear, and resilient water bodies.

Specifically engineered for farm ponds, commercial waterways, and recreational lakes, dropping these all-organic, enzyme driven pucks straight into your target waters triggers a continuous biological cleanup cascade:

  • Natural Algae Prevention: Toxic algae blooms are aggressively driven by excess nitrogen and phosphorus. These specialized microbes prevent blooms by outcompeting algae for these vital nutrients, locking them safely into microbial biomass instead.
  • Breaking the Nutrient Loop: Even when external runoff is reduced, heavy bottom muck and sludge act as a hidden reservoir that constantly feeds algae. Our biological solution breaks this recycling loop by digesting the muck at the bottom of the column.
  • Stable Oxygen Levels: Sudden chemical algaecides cause rapid plant die offs that lead to dangerous oxygen depletion and immediate recurring blooms. Our microbes suppress unwanted growth gradually, protecting fish and supporting healthier, balanced aquatic life.
  • Enhanced Decomposition: Boosting microbial diversity dramatically speeds up the natural breakdown of organic matter, clearing up water clarity and permanently reducing internal nutrient loading.

Biomentum

Tap Into the Power of Advanced Soil Biology

Transform your acreage by activating the natural biological engine right beneath your feet. Biomentum is a cutting edge microbial formula that introduces a highly targeted blend of beneficial bacteria alongside mycorrhizal and saprophytic fungi. By re-establishing this vital ecosystem, it triggers the plant's natural defenses and breaks down stubborn, locked up minerals into forms your crops can actually digest. Whether you are looking to suppress aggressive diseases like white mold, treat manure, or optimize your forage and hay quality, this highly versatile biological tool helps you grow more while spending less on traditional chemical inputs.

ABC Soil Health

The Ultimate Fuel Injection for Your Soil Matrix

Why let expensive fertilizer go to waste? ABC Soil Health is a premium, triple-action conditioner engineered to radically improve nutrient retention and root-zone activity. By fusing the energy-saving power of Aminos-N, the biological strength of Biomentum, and the structural benefits of Humic Acid, this formula ensures your inputs stay where they belong in the root zone. It provides a massive boost to native microbial populations, strengthens early-season crop vigor, and maximizes the return on investment of your entire fertility program.

ABC Soil Health Organic

Pure, High Performance Soil Conditioning for Organic Growers

Rebuild your land from the ground up without compromising your organic standards. This premium soil rejuvenator utilizes a powerful, clean labeled blend of nutrient rich Liquid Fish, active Humic Acid, and our signature Biomentum microbial formula. Together, these ingredients work in harmony to loosen tight soils, dramatically increase water and nutrient holding capacity, and feed the underground biology. It's the perfect solution for organic producers who want to maximize crop potential, naturally improve soil structure, and cultivate a highly productive ecosystem.

Aminos-N

Stress-Proof Your Yields with Premium Plant Nutrition

When heat waves, drought, or extreme weather strike, your crops shouldn't have to fight to survive. Aminos-N delivers a highly bioavailable dose of 18 essential L-form amino acids and 16 vital trace minerals directly to the plant. Because it provides a clean, easily digestible source of organic nitrogen, your crops don't have to waste valuable energy processing heavy synthetic fertilizers. Instead, they can focus that energy on thriving through environmental stress, maintaining steady growth, and pushing for top tier yields.

About Us

Natural Heartland Solutions is a farmer-developed agricultural enterprise dedicated to introducing premium, environmentally responsible solutions across the American Midwest.

Evan Deal

Co-Founder

Born and raised on an Iowa farm, Evan's deep connection to the land has shaped his entire life and career. He co-founded this company while actively pursuing his higher education and serving his country with the Iowa Air National Guard, a commitment that has included multiple tours on overseas deployment. Driven by a genuine passion for structural rural sustainability, Evan helped implement our high-efficiency biological formulas to give producers a proven, effective alternative to traditional heavy synthetics. Beyond the field, his dedication to the community extends into a deep engagement with Iowa and federal politics, keeping him at the forefront of the policies affecting rural America. Evan knows the sacrifice of service, he knows the realities of modern farming, and he is fully invested in the future of the American producer.

Wyatt Streit

Co-Founder

Born and raised in Iowa with a family history rooted in the state's earliest farming settlements, Wyatt has always understood the challenges facing modern growers.

While studying at Iowa State University, Wyatt used that firsthand knowledge to help bring a breakthrough solution to life. Recognizing the regulatory and logistical pressures surrounding water health and manure management, he partnered with Northwest Iowa operators to launch the Natural Heartland Solutions signature line of organic pucks designed to solve these exact on farm hurdles.

As the distributor of these signature lines, Wyatt's mission goes far beyond just moving product because his primary focus is to educate growers. He works directly with the agricultural community to share knowledge on manure optimization, compliance, and sustainable soil health, helping farmers understand exactly how to implement these tools for maximum impact. Wyatt knows the soil, he knows the regulations, and he knows what Iowa farmers need to succeed.
